title: Bandhan Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Bandhan Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bandhan Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bandhan Bank:
Bandhan Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bandhan Bank!
